author: Lucas Bryant
name: MuonPower: GradPower Below 1 for Muon
blurb: Non-record optimizer ablation showing that GradPower transfers differently to the Parameter Golf Muon stack. The paper default p=1.2 hurts in exploratory local runs, while p=0.9 improves over vanilla Muon. On a matched 1xH100 1200s seed-1337 run, p=0.9 reaches 1.28338224 final int8+zlib BPB versus 1.28691190 for p=1.0. A 3-seed local 4080 sweep also finds p=0.9 best, improving over p=1.0 by 0.00190881 BPB on mean final BPB.
gpu: 1xNVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3 best run; 1xRTX4080 WSL local sweep
